subject: Psychic Energy symbol — a stylized eye motif on a purple energy card
description: A classic Pokemon basic energy card with a solid purple gradient background. The central design is a large stylized eye symbol rendered in deep purple with a glowing white radial beam emanating upward from behind it. The eye motif is bold and graphic — a thick outer ring with a dark pupil — evoking psychic or supernatural perception. The card header reads ENERGY in pale lavender lettering against the purple field. The overall design is clean, symbolic, and iconographic rather than illustrative.
foreground: large stylized eye symbol with radial white glow
emotion: no figure; symbol conveys watchfulness and latent power
